content: Feature-based folder structure is the standard for React+Vite SPAs. Core layout: src/features/{auth,transactions,billing,pix,reports}/ each containing components/, hooks/, services/; src/lib/supabase.ts for singleton client; src/components/ for shared UI; src/hooks/ for cross-feature hooks; Supabase config in lib/supabase.ts with singleton. vite.config.ts at root with path aliases (@/). TypeScript recommended throughout.
